task.title: Set up caching for {endpoint}
task.description: Complete the following task: Set up caching for {endpoint}. Follow best practices and ensure quality.
constraints: Do NOT change the database schema.

steps.thought: Let me check if there are integration tests I should be aware of.
steps.observation:
# tax Configuration
# Generated by setup wizard

[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
name = "tax-project_db"
user = "app_user"
pool_size = 10

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl = 3600
backend = "redis"

[logging]
level = "INFO"
format = "json"
output = "stdout"

[features]
tax_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true
